ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_statistics" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "confirmed_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed deaths on that date */,
  "confirmed_total" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases up to that date */,
  "probable_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of probable deaths on that date */,
  "probable_total" INTEGER /* Total number of probable cases up to that date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total cases (confirmed + probable) up to that date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths (confirmed + probable) up to that date */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the statistics are recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the case occurred */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of case (e.g., confirmed, probable) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient information */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the patient */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the COVID-19 test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_info ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the death was reported */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the death occurred */,
  "death_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of death (e.g., confirmed, probable) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient information */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_info ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_death_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("death_type_id") REFERENCES death_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the death type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the death type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_info" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "pre_existing_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing conditions of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death report */,
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the death being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_reports_death_id FOREIGN KEY ("death_id") REFERENCES deaths ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analytics */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the analytics belongs to */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of the analytics (e.g., trends, correlations) */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Data used to derive the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)
